Condition.MESSAGE: AWS will delete backups before the RMAN recovery window has expired.
Condition.CLEAR_MESSAGE: AWS will not delete backups before the RMAN recovery window has expired.

Condition.MESSAGE: Insufficient margin after RMAN Recovery Window and AWS Lifecycle Deletion of Objects. We expect a minimum of 2*(RECOVERY_WINDOW+10) days to ensure RMAN has deleted objects before AWS expires them.
Condition.CLEAR_MESSAGE: Sufficient margin after RMAN Recovery Window and AWS Lifecycle Deletion of Objects.
